title: 93 "Young Indian Institutes Of Excellence" Launched To Prep Rural Girls For JEE, NEET, And CLAT
description: First-year programmes run MPC at KGBV Palamakula in Ranga Reddy for 202 students, BiPC at KGBV Jinnaram in Sangareddy for 202 students, and CEC at KGBV Munugode in Nalgonda for 150 students.
